Interface OpenRpcComponents

All Superinterfaces:
Components, Node, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenRpc13Components, OpenRpc14Components, OpenRpc1xComponents
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenRpc13ComponentsImpl, OpenRpc14ComponentsImpl
public interface OpenRpcComponents extends Components
